harness_kind: Two harnesses: (1) browser-loadable output.html that runs the same checks live in a browser; (2) headless node-runner that produced report.json against the integrated artifact.
skip_rationale: PNV.1, IP1.A1, DCA.25 require opening index.html in an actual browser, playing hands, reloading, etc. Code-inspection covers the underlying invariants; full prompt_named_verb run requires a human or browser-automation pass.
production_fidelity: Headless run reads files from output/integration/ relative paths; matches what file:// would load.
